name: Rabbit Riot
short_description: Trapped in a rabbit’s body after military experiments, you must navigate a haunted mansion filled with dangers, unravel dark secrets, and escape before it’s too late.
detailed_description:
In Rabbit Riot, you are the unfortunate victim of a military experiment that transferred your consciousness into the body of a rabbit. The experiment was a success, but during the transfer, you manage to knock over the containment box, opening a narrow window for escape. Now, trapped in an unfamiliar body, you must navigate the eerie, labyrinthine halls of an abandoned mansion. Dark secrets from the past haunt every corner, and deadly guard dogs patrol the grounds. As you venture deeper into the mansion, you’ll not only fight to survive, but also uncover the terrifying fate of two other test subjects, whose experiments went horribly wrong. Solve the mysteries, avoid the deadly enemies, and find a way to escape before it’s too late.

Key Features:

  • Heart-Pounding Horror: Immerse yourself in a chilling atmosphere where every step could be your last.

  • Intense Survival Gameplay: Use agility and quick thinking to dodge vicious enemies, avoid deadly traps, and stay alive.

  • Unravel Dark Secrets: Delve into the mansion’s sinister past and uncover the truth behind the military experiments that changed everything.

  • Engaging Storyline: A captivating narrative that pulls you into the rabbit’s fight for survival and freedom.

  • Stunning Visuals: Experience beautifully eerie environments that enhance the sense of dread and tension.

  • Multiple Endings: Your choices matter, with different outcomes depending on the path you take and the secrets you uncover.

  • Unlockable Content: Find hidden secrets and unlock bonus content that adds depth to the story and world.

  • Immersive Sound Design: Atmospheric sounds and a haunting soundtrack that elevate the horror experience and keep you on edge.
